THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUBIN, JANA MARDEN, PAM (AKA: MARDEN, PATRICIA) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YING, VIRGINIA HUI $699.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $804.00, JUDGMENT IS ALLOCATED AS $300 TO PLAINTIFF RUBEN, AND $399 TO PLAINTIFF PAM MARDEN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT YING, VIRGINIA HUI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT RUBIN, JANA MARDEN, PAM (AKA: MARDEN, PATRICIA) DEFENDANT AND CROSS-PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM PERTAINING TO MAINTENANCE OF COMMON ACCESS AND MANAGEMENT AND ACCOUNTING MUST BE BROUGHT AGAINST TO THE HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
